extra.ner_note: ML NER (personal name detection via Presidio) not run in this demo. In production, threshold >= 0.6 recommended to avoid masking Indic place names (e.g., Mysuru/Mumbai) as personal names.
extra.precision_recall_note: High aggressiveness (threshold < 0.4) increases recall but hurts precision. Indic NER models confuse common nouns and place names as personal names.

extra.v4_reality_note: V4 had no active decontamination filters. Band B2 was deleted after 18.7% collision rate audit. This stage prevents that failure.
extra.canary_note: Canary GUIDs should be inserted into eval sets to detect future leakage.

extra.v4_bug_fixed: V4 used non-deterministic Spark SQL row counters for shard IDs and word*1.3 for token counts. We use SHA-256-derived IDs and BPE-aware counting.
